title: podochilus micranthus
intro: Podochilus micranthus, also known as the small-flowered Podochilus, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Podochilus micranthus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Podochilus micranthus are typically made by boiling the plant's roots and leaves in water to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
